products.name: GIS Application & Dashboard Customization
products.description: Customization of GIS dashboard for Nagar Panchayat Lalganj, including integration with existing MIS systems and census records.

products.name: Mobile App for Field Data Collection
products.description: Android/iOS mobile application for on-field data collection, geotagging, and real-time synchronization with the central GIS server.

products.name: UAV and LiDAR Survey Services
products.description: High-resolution UAV aerial photography and LiDAR survey for topographic mapping and 3D modeling of the municipal area.

products.name: Property & POI Mapping and Geotagging
products.description: Door-to-door property survey, Point of Interest (POI) mapping, and geotagging of all municipal assets and boundaries.

products.name: Geo-Referencing & Digitization of Existing Maps
products.description: Scanning, geo-referencing, and vectorization of existing municipal paper maps and district boundary records.

products.name: Data Analysis & Master Plan Preparation
products.description: Comprehensive data analysis of surveyed information and preparation of the GIS-based Master Plan for urban development.

products.name: Cloud Hosting & Technical Support (4 Months)
products.description: Secure cloud infrastructure hosting for the GIS platform and 4 months of technical handholding and maintenance support.

products.name: Internal Staff Training & Workshops
products.description: Capacity building workshops and hands-on training for Nagar Panchayat staff on using the GIS dashboard and mobile app.
